commands.review_summary:
The PR wraps transcript append call sites with `guardSessionManager`, threads config/update-mode options, exports the guard through the agent harness runtime barrel, and adds transcript redaction/update tests.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path: append a secret-bearing assistant message through the current transcript helper and inspect the JSONL, because current main serializes `params.message` directly while docs promise persisted transcript redaction. I did not run a live repro because this review was read-only.
commands.review_followup: This security-sensitive external PR needs contributor real behavior proof plus maintainer review of append locking and SDK boundary choices, so it is not a safe automated repair lane right now.
